Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}We have to make our way out of the hot spring without being spotted.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}This is a life-or-death mission. If we fail, calling this an accident isn't gonna cut it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Hmm, I don't see anyone here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}That's Fuuka-san's voice. Is she going around the rock?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}H-Hey! You're leading this operation, aren't ya?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Seems like a bold move, but I trust your judgment![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Wow, you really know what you're doing![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Seems like a bold move, but it's just steam...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm having second thoughts...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0} was at least[n]{f 4 31 2 4 1 0}, I might've stood my ground...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 4 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Oh, this is bad! Let's just hide by the rock for now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Wait! We can't go that way either![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Is this rock formation natural?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}H-Hey, there isn't anything hiding by that rock, is there?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Is this rock formation natural?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}H-Hey, is something hiding in the rock's shadows?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}In the shadows... No, there's no one here. See? You have nothing to be afraid of.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Looks like we bought ourselves some time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}But if the wind picks up even a little, we'll totally get spotted![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Mitsuru and Aigis are probably close, too. Can't afford to be careless here. But now what?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_022_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Use the duck as a red herring.

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I get it. We'll distract them with noise.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}My duck? What do you want that for?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's no time to explain![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0} were at least[n]{f 4 31 0 5 1 0}, I could've clarified faster![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Dammit, the wind's picking up. No choice but to bolt for the exit![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Oh, so this is our ghost's true identity.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}You idiots! I told you not to be careless![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Oh, so this is our ghost's true identity.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}Yukari, what's wrong? What happened?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}There was a splash just now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}We know where they are now. This is our chance![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}We'll never make it if we just run out into the open like that![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}But you said we can't just stay here, Junpei-kun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}What's this? It appears to be a rubber duck.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}But still, isn't it kind of weird to find this here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}Hm? I detect a presence straight ahead.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 4 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}Whoa, so much confidence! You're like a natural-born leader.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}Well, you got us this far. Might as well go all in with ya![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}Yeah, you didn't look so sure about that, did you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wasn't convincing enough...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} was at least {f 4 31 1 6 1 0},[n]we could've made a run for it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}What's this? It appears to be a rubber duck.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}But still, isn't it kind of weird to find this here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}Hm? I detect a presence straight ahead.[n]{f 1 1}
